\[
\Omega (\mathcal {M}) = \left\{\omega \in \Sigma : \forall s \in \mathcal {S}, \omega_ {s} = \sum_ {s ^ {\prime}, a ^ {\prime}} p _ {\mathcal {M}} (s | s ^ {\prime}, a ^ {\prime}) \omega_ {s ^ {\prime} a ^ {\prime}} \right\}.
\]

Input: Confidence level \(\delta\) , ERGODIC boolean variable, communication parameter \(m\) or an upper bound.   
1 if ERGODIC then   
2 Set \((\varepsilon_{t})_{t\geq 1} = (1 / \sqrt{t})_{t\geq 1}\)   
3 else   
4 Set \((\varepsilon_{t})_{t\geq 1} = (t^{-\frac{1}{m + 1}})_{t\geq 1}\)   
5 end   
6 Set \(t\gets 0\) and \(N_{sa}(t)\gets 0\) , for all (s,a).   
7 Initialize empirical estimate \(\widehat{\mathcal{M}}_0\) by drawing an arbitrary MDP from \(\mathbb{M}\)   
8 Compute \(\widehat{\pi}_t^\star \gets\) POLICY-ITERATION( \(\widehat{\mathcal{M}}_t\) ).   
9 while Stopping condition (13) is not satisfied do   
10 Compute \(\omega^{\star}(\widehat{\mathcal{M}}_t)\) according to (7) and \(\pi^o (\widehat{\mathcal{M}}_t)\) according to (8).   
11 if \(t = 0\) then   
12 Play \(a_0\sim \mathrm{Unif}([|1,A|])\)   
13 else   
14 Play \(a_t\sim \pi_t(.|s_t)\) , where \(\pi_t\) is determined by either (9) or (10).   
15 end   
16 Observe \((R_{t},s_{t + 1})\sim q(.|s_{t},a_{t})\otimes p(.|s_{t},a_{t}).\)   
17 \(t\gets t + 1\)   
18 Update \(\widehat{\mathcal{M}}_t\) and \((N_{sa}(t))_{s,a}\)   
19 Compute \(\widehat{\pi}_t^\star \gets\) POLICY-ITERATION( \(\widehat{\mathcal{M}}_t\) ).   
20 end   
Output: Empirical optimal policy \(\widehat{\pi}_{T}^{\star}\)

\[

\]

\]

\]

\[
\mathcal {O} \bigg (\inf _ {\omega \in \Omega (\mathcal {M})} \max _ {(s, a): a \neq \pi^ {*} (s)} \frac {1 + \mathrm {V a r} _ {p (s , a)} [ V _ {\mathcal {M}} ^ {\star} ]}{\omega_ {s a} \Delta_ {s a} ^ {2}} + \frac {1}{\min _ {s} \omega_ {s , \pi^ {*} (s)} \Delta_ {\min} ^ {2} (1 - \gamma) ^ {3}} \bigg) \log (1 / \delta).
\]
